name: Carotid Artery Atherosclerosis Disease (CAAD)
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with carotid artery atherosclerosis disease based on diagnosis codes and imaging procedures. The phenotype identifies cases with documented carotid stenosis.
prompt: Find all patients who have been diagnosed with carotid artery atherosclerosis or stenosis, or who have had carotid artery imaging studies showing evidence of atherosclerotic disease.

required_codes.display: Occlusion and stenosis of carotid artery without mention of cerebral infarction
Occlusion and stenosis of carotid artery
